Home / Services / Outdoor Entertainment Systems

Outdoor Entertainment Systems

Weatherproof audio-visual solutions for Austin's outdoor living spaces.

Central Texas' long outdoor living season demands durable, high-performance systems. We design outdoor entertainment setups that withstand both summer heat and occasional winter storms, using marine-grade speakers and sun-resistant displays.

For pools and patios, we implement specialized audio zoning that maintains clarity over splashing water and AC unit noise. Our concealed wiring methods protect against rodents common in Austin's greenbelts, with all connections rated for flood zone installation.

We coordinate with local landscapers to integrate speakers into existing hardscaping, creating invisible systems that disappear when not in use. Solutions range from simple background music setups to full outdoor theaters with retractable screens designed for Hill Country sunset viewing.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Site evaluation including sun exposure and noise sources
  2. 02 Step 2: Equipment selection based on exposure levels
  3. 03 Step 3: Professional installation with flood-proof wiring
  4. 04 Step 4: Tuning for optimal performance at different times of day

Benefits

  • 100°F+ rated components
  • Insect/rodent resistant wiring
  • Glare-optimized display placement
  • Harmony with outdoor lighting

Frequently Asked Questions

How do you prevent sun damage to outdoor TVs?

We only use commercial-grade displays with anti-glare coatings and active cooling, mounted in locations that receive afternoon shade with optional motorized sunshades.

Can the system handle pool parties?

Our poolside audio solutions use directional speakers that focus sound where needed while minimizing neighbor disturbance, with volume limiters for compliance with Austin noise ordinances.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with outdoor entertainment systems? Contact us today.

Request Quote Or call: 555-hom-r90
